Patient.title: Patient
Patient.description: Represents a clinic patient and their contact details.

nationalId.description: National ID card number of the patient

Appointment.title: Appointment
Appointment.description: Represents an appointment slot for a patient in the calendar.

finalConfirmation.description: Flag for final checkup/follow-up phone call confirmed

color.description: Visual theme color tag for calendar

arrivalConfirmed.description: True if patient confirmed they are coming

dealClosed.description: True if booking fee or treatment fee is settled

bookedBy.description: Name of representative who created this booking

smsTextSent.description: Stored text of the sent reminder message

noShow.description: True if patient did not show up (no-show/missed)

Representative.title: Representative
Representative.description: Represents a clinic staff member / user / station operator.

name.description: Readable name of the staff member

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Global settings for the clinic application including SMS gateway configuration.

SystemInfo.title: SystemInfo
SystemInfo.description: Information about the systems current release status and versioning.

id.description: Unique identifier of the system info doc

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this version was published

appointments/{appointmentId}.description: Collection of scheduled treatments and appointments.

settings/{settingsId}.description: Global configurations and SMS gateway variables.

representatives/{repId}.description: Registered clinic representatives and agents authorized on various stations.

system_info/{infoId}.description: Collection tracking the current target build versions for launcher integration.
